column3: Welcome, adventurer. I have been stationed here to assist those brave enough to enter these dungeons.
Is there anything I can help you with?

column3: Click on an enemy to attack. Your melee level determines your accuracy and max hit. Eat food to restore health - it does not regenerate on its own.
You have 28 inventory slots. Equip better gear to improve your combat stats. Keep food and potions on hand. Hold Shift and left-click an item to drop it.
